expectations.text: Letter includes tenant name (Sarah Chen) and property address (123 Oak Street)
Current rent ($1,800) and new rent ($1,900) are both stated
expectations.evidence: Both amounts listed with bold formatting

expectations.text: Tone is professional but not cold - follows the real estate template pattern
expectations.evidence: Letter is quite terse and formal. Uses bold markdown formatting, no warmth or empathy. Just states facts without building rapport. Does not follow the skill's approachable tone pattern.

eval_feedback.overall: Tone assertion is subjective but effective at differentiating.
